name: academorix/omniterm
purpose: Terminal UI toolkit — live rendering, async tasks, spinners, browser navigation, and rich HTML-to-ANSI output for Laravel Artisan commands.
capabilities: HTML-to-ANSI rendering with Tailwind class support
Live task with animated spinners + feedback rows
Status messages + data tables + visual elements
when_to_use: Building an Artisan command that needs rich terminal output, progress bars, spinners, or interactive prompts.
when_not_to_use: For plain single-line status messages, use Laravel's built-in $this->info() / $this->error() helpers.
